title: Acronis Asset Rule
description: One rule declaration. Lives at ./rules/<name>.json. The executor is out of scope today; this file documents intent.

kind.description: What the rule does. `scale` resizes the base value's bounding box to the target. `stroke` sets every stroked path on the base to the target width.

target.description: Single composite target. Shared shape across all kinds today; meaning depends on `kind`. Unit enum is intentionally narrow — widening requires a coordinated schema change.
